title: Vitamin B2 (riboflavin)
body_html:
Riboflavin is a cofactor of flavin adenine dinucleotide (FAD) and flavin mononucleotide (FMN) and is important in energy metabolism.

Consequences of riboflavin deficiency:
  • angular cheilitis
